parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ci_pipeline_runs (job_name, build_number, status, build_url, git_sha, image_name, release_tag, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, published_tags, payload, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  {{$json.job_name}},
  {{$json.build_number}},
  {{$json.status}},
  {{$json.build_url || null}},
  {{$json.git_sha || null}},
  {{$json.image_name || null}},
  {{$json.release_tag || null}},
  {{$json.started_at || null}},
  {{$json.finished_at || null}},
  {{$json.duration_ms || null}},
  {{JSON.stringify($json.published_tags || [])}}::jsonb,
  {{JSON.stringify($json)}}::jsonb,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (job_name, build_number)
DO UPDATE SET
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  build_url = EXCLUDED.build_url,
  git_sha = EXCLUDED.git_sha,
  image_name = EXCLUDED.image_name,
  release_tag = EXCLUDED.release_tag,
  started_at = EXCLUDED.started_at,
  finished_at = EXCLUDED.finished_at,
  duration_ms = EXCLUDED.duration_ms,
  published_tags = EXCLUDED.published_tags,
  payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, job_name, build_number, status, created_at, updated_at;
